name: @holycodex/lsp-daemon
description: Shared per-user Language Server Protocol daemon over a unix socket, with a stdio MCP proxy and a tool client.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && bun build src/cli.ts src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm && node scripts/stamp-dist-version.mjs
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && biome check . && npm run build
